---
title: "To Err is Human: An Empirical Investigation"
date: "2026-02-22"

author:
  # - name: Daniel Lakens
  #   affiliation: "Eindhoven Technical University"
  #   orcid: 0000-0002-0247-239X
  #   email: lakens@gmail.com
  #   roles: 
  #   - conceptualization 
  #   - data curation
  #   - funding acquisition
  #   - software 
  #   - validation 
  #   - writing
  #   corresponding: true
  - name: Lisa DeBruine
    affiliation: "University of Glasgow"
  #   orcid: 0000-0002-7523-5539
  #   email: lisa.debruine@glasgow.ac.uk
  #   roles: 
  #   - conceptualization 
  #   - data curation
  #   - software 
  #   - validation 
  #   - editing
  #   corresponding: false
  #- name: Jakub Werner
  #  affiliation: "Eindhoven Technical University"
  #   roles: 
  #   - software 
  #   - validation
  #   corresponding: false

format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: apa7
    classoption: man
    pdf-engine: lualatex

abstract: |
  This is the abstract. It should be a single paragraph.

bibliography: references.bib
---

# Introduction

Your introduction text.
